Wait for slight dip/retest for better risk-reward. 2. Take Profit: TP1: 111,500 – 112,000 USDT Near previous resistance and upper Bollinger Band. TP2 (aggressive): 113,300+ Based on upper Bollinger breakout potential. 3. Stop Loss: SL: 103,500 – 104,000 USDT Below a key support and lower wick regions. Also gives space below middle BB. Klines are uniquely identified by their open time. Please note the maximum limit is 1,000 bars. Weight: 1 Parameters: | Name | Type | Mandatory | Description | --- --- | | symbol | STRING | YES | | interval | ENUM | YES | | startTime | LONG | NO | | endTime | LONG | NO | | limit | INT | NO | Default 500; max 1000 | If startTime and endTime are not sent, the most recent klines are returned. evidences.content: Historical Market Data We've made Candlestick, Trade, and AggTrade data for all pairs available for download. What Data Is Available We provide data at daily and monthly intervals. Data for a day is uploaded the following day, and we begin to upload data for a month at the beginning of the following month. Data Products Open API ## Frequently Asked Questions Candlestick Also known as k-line, is distinguished by its open time and supports multiple intervals for analysis and interpretation.
